title: Peruvian-Style Turmeric Chicken Pilaf
description: A flavorful Chinese-inspired dish that combines the spicy kick of Peruvian cuisine with the warmth of turmeric. This aromatic pilaf is perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high.
Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove chicken from skillet and set aside.
Add ginger and garlic to skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in turmeric, chili powder, and cilantro; cook for 1 minute.
Add rice and pilaf to skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Return chicken to skillet and stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
